HIRING THROUGHPUT DIAGNOSIS

SCREEN-FIRST SCRIPT (trainable role)

1) Learning signal (e.g. last book / last skill learned): _______________
2) Three adjectives + example of one under pressure: _______________
3) Light judgment scenario (not product): _______________
4) Only if pass: tech/process intro (teach later): _______________
Advance Y/N rule: _______________

ROUNDTABLE TIME-BOX
Roles on panel: _______________
Total minutes: ___
Per stage: intro __ / screen __ / scenario __ / debrief __

SCORECARD LOCK

Nice-to-have: _______________
Automatic no: _______________
Panel calibration note: _______________

WEEK-ONE AUDIT
Candidates: ___  Avg minutes: ___  Pass%: ___
False pass signals: _______________
Adjust script: _______________
